reason: Enabling FIPS mode requires a kernel boot parameter (fips=1) and is not supported on an existing system; attempting to remediate can render the system unusable or permanently non-compliant. The change involves critical bootloader/kernel configuration and can affect all cryptographic operations, making it a high-risk modification.
estimated_impact: reboot required; FIPS mode change; kernel boot parameter alteration; potential system instability; permanent finding on installed systems
